title: Create Craft Extras
description: This datapack adds some recipes that are missing from the create mod. This datapack will continue to receive updates and will listen to any feedback.
body:
This datapack is designed to enhance the gameplay experience of the Create mod by introducing additional recipes that were not originally included. These new recipes aim to fill the gaps and provide players with more crafting options, thereby enriching their overall gaming experience. Furthermore, the developers have committed to regularly updating this datapack to ensure that it remains relevant. They are also open to receiving feedback from the community, actively seeking suggestions and ideas for further improvements. This collaborative approach underscores the commitment to addressing the needs and preferences of the player base, making it a community-driven enhancement to the original mod.

**Thanks for 2000 downloads!**
